productDisplayName: Puma Men Red Contest Hi Shoes
description: Style NoteThese stylish Contest Hi shoes from puma are great for urban wear. These high profile shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive high-profile design looks great when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Product DetailsLeather and other materials high top upper with nubuck formstripe overlayPerforated side panels and toe box for enhanced breathabilityCentral lace-ups for snug FitPadded tongue and built up padded collar with fabric padding for greater comfortBrand name appliquéd on the tongue and printed on the sideAppliqued suede form stripes on the sidesCushioned insole for all day comfortEVA midsole for greater shock absorptionRubber outsole with horizontal grooves for greater tractionPivot point on the big toe mound and heel for a 180 degree movementMaterial and CareSynthetic, leatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
